The '''Mekuun Corporation''' was a company which dealt primarily in [[repulsorcraft]]s. Repulsorcraft designer [[Simeon Densend]] freelanced for Mekuun prior to working for [[Narglatch AirTech]].<ref name="Star Wars Propaganda">''[[Star Wars Propaganda: A History of Persuasive Art in the Galaxy]]''</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
